title: Eye of the Eagle 2: Inside the Enemy
original_title: Eye of the Eagle 2: Inside the Enemy
overview: When soldier Anthony Glenn discovers that Mai is missing, he sets out to rescue her from the corrupt Major Sorenson pitting soldier against soldier in a bloody game of honor.
